records.title: Plan-vs-repo drift: external strategy docs may target a stale/empty repo snapshot and trigger destructive literal execution.
records.mitigation: The Founder-OS layer is additive-only. AGENTS.md, README, and existing CI are never overwritten. New ledgers are guarded by tests/test_ledgers_schema.py so they cannot silently rot.

records.title: Agent over-privilege in CI: a Claude agent workflow with contents:write plus API secrets is high-blast-radius on a public repo.
records.mitigation: The agent workflow is documented as opt-in only in docs/CLOUD_CODE_COMMAND_CENTER.md with least-privilege scopes; it is NOT enabled by default and never merges to main.
